author: Wzyss
install_msg: Thank you for installing BoostUtils! Use `[p]help boostutils` to see available commands.
name: BoostUtils
short: Manage booster-dependent custom roles and configurable boost notifications.
description: Tracks configured custom roles that require the Server Booster role, removes them on booster loss, restores them when booster status returns, and provides configurable boost announcements and status-change notifications.
